evals.prompt: Necesito que revises este artículo de química computacional para una revista indexada en JCR. Aquí está el PDF: [paper_dft.pdf]. Empieza el análisis completo.
evals.expected_output: Internal review report with all sections: title/abstract, introduction, methodology (with DFT-specific criteria: software version, functional, basis set, convergence criteria), results/figures, discussion, citation verification (attempt to verify all references via WebSearch), and a recommendation with justification. Should ask if editor report is needed before generating it.
assertions: The review identifies the study type as computational
The review checks for DFT-specific methodological details (functional, basis set, software version)
At least one citation verification search is performed via WebSearch
The output contains the structured internal summary with the recommendation scale
The review asks the user before generating the editor report
Suspicious or unverified citations are explicitly flagged

evals.prompt: Me llegó este artículo de revisión sistemática sobre inhibidores enzimáticos y necesito hacer peer review. Aquí está el documento: [systematic_review.pdf]. Necesito el reporte para el editor en inglés cuando termines.
evals.expected_output: Review applies PRISMA checklist (auto-detected as systematic review). Evaluates PRISMA flow diagram, search strategy reproducibility, risk of bias assessment, heterogeneity analysis. Produces internal summary, then asks about editor format — or proceeds to generate editor format since the user already requested it. Editor report in English using the generic template.
assertions: PRISMA guideline is detected and applied automatically
The review checks for a PRISMA flow diagram
The review evaluates the search strategy reproducibility
The review assesses risk of bias methodology
The editor report is produced in English
The editor report includes confidential Comments to the Editor and Comments to the Authors sections

evals.prompt: Tengo que revisar urgentemente este paper de bioquímica. Me preocupa que algunas citas no existen. Por favor verifica todas las referencias con especial cuidado. El paper está aquí: [biochemistry_paper.pdf]
evals.expected_output: Performs comprehensive citation verification: searches each reference via WebSearch using DOI or author+year+title queries. Classifies references as Verified/Unverified/Suspicious. Explicitly lists all suspicious/unverified ones. Also conducts full paper review. Internal summary prominently features citation verification results.
assertions: WebSearch is called multiple times for citation verification
References are classified into verified/unverified/suspicious categories
Suspicious or unverified references are listed with specific details
The citation verification section is prominently featured in the summary
The review covers methodology and figures in addition to citations
